name: Deadly Zombie Breath
name_jp: <!-- <ruby lang="jp"><rb>朽ち果ての吐息</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゾンビ・デッドリー・ブレス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> -->
desc: If you control a Zombie monster and "Call of the Haunted": Target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. If you control a Zombie monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up card you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; send them to the GY. You can only use 1 "Deadly Zombie Breath" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: If you control a Zombie monster and "Call of the Haunted": Target 1 monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. If you control a Zombie monster: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up card you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; send them to the GY. You can only use 1 "Deadly Zombie Breath" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
